message.content: (1) FAIL - The left sidebar shows multiple nav items (Tableau de bord, Étudiants, Enseignants, Suivi pédagogique, Alertes IA, Rapports, Journal d'audit) instead of only Tableau de bord and Candidatures. (2) FAIL - The main content shows a dashboard view with statistics cards and charts, not a table of candidatures. (3) FAIL - The sidebar header shows "RESPONSABLE PÉDAGOGIQUE" instead of "Candidat". (4) FAIL - The user profile shows "Claire Lambert" / "Responsable pédagogique" instead of "Marie Dupont" / "Candidat".
